title: Sales Support Admin (Training Provided)
description:
Basic information:

  • Salary UP $3,500 (Depending on experience)
  • Monday to Friday, 9am to 6.30pm
  • Location: East
  • Training provided, fun & vibrant environment

Job Scope:

  • Provide administrative and operational support to the sales team to ensure smooth daily operations.

  • Prepare and process quotations, sales orders, invoices, and delivery documentation accurately and promptly.

  • Coordinate with internal teams to ensure timely order fulfillment and customer satisfaction.

  • Track sales activities, order status, and delivery schedules, providing regular updates to the sales team and customers.

  • Prepare weekly and monthly sales reports, including sales performance and pipeline tracking.

  • Handle customer inquiries, follow-ups, and basic issue resolution professionally.

  • Perform general administrative duties and ad-hoc tasks as assigned.

For interested candidates, please submit your updated resume by using the APPLY NOW BUTTON

By submitting your personal data and/or resume to us in connection with your job application, you will be deemed to have agreed and consented to us in collecting, using, retaining, and disclosing your personal data and/or resume to prospective employers for the purpose of the evaluating, processing and administration by company relating to this job application.

We regret to inform that only shortlisted candidates would be notified


We wish you all the best in your career search.

Zen Career Pte Ltd | EA License No: 24C2559
Charlotte Lim (Limanqi) | EA Personnel No: R23113764

postedCompany.description:
At Zen Career Pte Ltd, we are dedicated to connecting talent with opportunity. As a dynamic recruitment firm, we specialize in permanent staffing, temporary staffing, contract staffing, and payroll parking, serving businesses across various industries.

Our mission is to empower both employers and job seekers. We strive to offer personalized and effective recruitment solutions, understanding the unique needs of our clients and the career aspirations of candidates. By fostering meaningful connections, we aim to drive success and growth for all parties involved.

With a passionate team and a commitment to excellence, Zen Career Pte Ltd is your trusted partner in navigating the world of work. We believe in the power of people and are devoted to making a positive impact through our tailored staffing services.
postedCompany.name: ZEN CAREER PTE. LTD.
